revision.text:
{{Expand Japanese|波爾布神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hanifu Shrine | native_name = 波爾布神社 | image = Hanifu.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hanifu Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.38545|136.021226}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|lt=Haniyasu|en|Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|it|Haniyasu|ja|ハニヤス|pl|Haniyasu|zh|波邇夜須毘古神與波邇夜須毘賣神|qid=Q9285919|1=Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hanifu Shrine'''|波爾布神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|ja|近江国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 133 ** P155: {{ill|Shiroshino Shrine|lt=Shiroshino Shrine|qid=Q135039886|1=Shiroshino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Ohomitsuwakeno Shrine|lt=Ohomitsuwakeno Shrine|qid=Q135039888|1=Ohomitsuwakeno Shrine (Q135039888)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Takashima, Shiga|lt=Takashima|ar|تاكاشيما (شيغا)|azb|تاکاشیما، شیقا|ceb|Takashima|ce|Такасима|de|Takashima (Shiga)|en|Takashima, Shiga|eo|Takaŝima|es|Takashima (Shiga)|fa|تاکاشیما، شیگا|fi|Takashima|fr|Takashima|gl|Takashima|id|Takashima, Shiga|it|Takashima|ja|高島市|ko|다카시마시|mzn|تاکاشیما، شیگا|nl|Takashima|pl|Takashima|pt|Takashima (Shiga)|ro|Takashima, Shiga|ru|Такасима|sv|Takashima|tg|Такашима|th|ทากาชิมะ|tl|Takashima, Shiga|tr|Takashima|tt|Такасима|uk|Такасіма (Сіґа)|vi|Takashima, Shiga|war|Takashima, Shiga|zh_classical|高島市|zh_min_nan|Takasima-chhī|zh_yue|高島|zh|高島市|qid=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}} * {{ill|Ōmi Province|lt=Ōmi Province|ca|Província d'Ōmi|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆمی|cs|Provincie Ómi|de|Provinz Ōmi|en|Ōmi Province|es|Provincia de Ōmi|fa|ولایت اومی|fi|Ōmin provinssi|fr|Province d'Ōmi|gl|Provincia de Ōmi|hak|Ōmi-koet|id|Provinsi Ōmi|it|Ōmi|ja|近江国|ko|오미국|lt|Omio žemė|nl|Omi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Ōmi|pt|Província de Ōmi|ru|Оми (провинция)|simple|Ōmi Province|sk|Ómi (provincia)|sr|Провинција Оми|tr|Ōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Омі|vi|Tỉnh Ōmi|zh_min_nan|Ômi-kok|zh_yue|近江國|zh|近江國|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}} * {{ill|Takashima District, Shiga|lt=Takashima district|en|Takashima District, Shiga|fa|بخش تاکاشیما، شیگا|ja|高島郡 (滋賀県)|zh|高島郡 (滋賀縣)|qid=Q11669692|1=Takashima District, Shiga}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.38545|136.021226}} == image (P18) == * Hanifu.JPG == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|lt=Haniyasu|en|Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime|it|Haniyasu|ja|ハニヤス|pl|Haniyasu|zh|波邇夜須毘古神與波邇夜須毘賣神|qid=Q9285919|1=Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181913 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * はにふじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2160005007799 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市新旭町饗庭3363', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:波爾布神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11555577}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称=Hanifu Shrine |画像=[[ファイル:Hanifu.JPG|270px]]
Haiden |所在地={{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima|Q845794|qid=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}Shin-Asahi-chō Aiba 3363 |位置={{Coord|35|23|7.65|N|136|1|16.37|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神={{ill|lt=Haniyasu|Q9285919|qid=Q9285919|lt=Haniyama-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mitsuha-no-me-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建=Founding period unknown |本殿=Three-bay {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名=Habu Daimyōjin
Habu-san |例祭={{ill|lt=April 20|Q2524|qid=Q2524|1=April 20}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Hanifu Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Hanifu Shrine''' (はにふじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Aiba, Shin-Asahi-chō, {{ill|lt=Takashima|Q845794|qid=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is also called Habu Daimyōjin or Habu-san. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Haniyasu|Q9285919|qid=Q9285919|lt=Haniyama-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Mitsuha-no-me-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === :Sennari gourd === History === :Founding period is unknown. Shrine tradition says Mitsuha-no-me-no-Mikoto had been worshiped since ancient times, and in {{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|qid=Q1199879|1=Tenpyō}} 13, {{ill|lt=Haniyasu|Q9285919|qid=Q9285919|lt=Haniyama-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Haniyasu-hiko and Haniyasu-hime}} was invited from {{ill|lt=Takeshima Meoso-no-Mikoto Shrine|Q11486644|qid=Q11486644|1=Tatsushima Meoyanomikoto Shrine}} in Naka District of {{ill|lt=Awa Province|Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} (present {{ill|lt=Komatsushima|Q823493|qid=Q823493|1=Komatsushima, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}). It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. It was the sōsha of Kizu-no-shō. In an {{ill|lt=Ōei|Q1193078|qid=Q1193078|1=Ōei}} cadastral ledger, over one chō of tax-exempt fields were assigned. During the Meiji-period {{ill|lt=haibutsu kishaku|Q702298|qid=Q702298|1=Haibutsu kishaku}}, many shrine treasures were lost due to radicals in the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takashima Kamui Corps|1=UNKNOWN}}. A list of discarded items remains in the "Taya family documents" (included in 'Takashima Gunshi' and '{{ill|lt=Shintō Taikei|Q11590923|qid=Q11590923|1=Shintō Taikei}} Ōmi Province'). Former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Festivals === :'''Kinen Festival''' March 10 :'''Annual Festival''' April 20 :Until Meiji, it was held on the first {{ill|lt=ox day|Q16539206|qid=Q16539206|1=chǒu}} of the second month. :Shrine tradition says the sacred object of {{ill|lt=Chikuma Shrine (Maibara)|Q11602835|qid=Q11602835|lt=Chikuma Shrine|1=Chikuma Shrine (Maibara)}} in Irie village, {{ill|lt=Sakata District|Q7402853|qid=Q7402853|1=Sakata District, Shiga}} (present {{ill|lt=Maibara|Q824020|qid=Q824020|1=Maibara, Shiga}}), was carried by rising waters of {{ill|lt=Lake Biwa|Q200239|qid=Q200239|1=Lake Biwa}} and washed ashore at Kizu beach, and in connection with that, an offering rite used to cross the lake from Chikuma Shrine. Because of rough waters this crossing rite was abolished, and sacred fields called Chikuma-da were established. Rice from those fields, called '''Chikuma Miké''', came to be offered at the otabisho during mikoshi processions. ("Aiba Village Local History," "Takashima Gunshi") :The festival was traditionally conducted by shrine families of {{ill|lt=Tatesuna Shrine (Takashima)|Q11387238|qid=Q11387238|lt=Tatesuna Shrine|1=Tatehaya Shrine (Takashima)}}, {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi Shrine (Takashima)|Q11433666|qid=Q11433666|lt=Ōkuninushi Shrine|1=Ookuninushi Shrine (Takashima)}}, and Wakamiya Hachiman-sha; today priests from {{ill|lt=Hiyoshi Ninomiya Shrine|Q11505027|qid=Q11505027|1=Hiyoshi Ninomiya Shrine}} and Mori Shrine may also join. :'''Niiname Festival''' November 23 === Precinct shrines === * {{ill|lt=Kumano Shrine (Takashima)|Q11568963|qid=Q11568963|lt=Kumano Shrine|1=Kumano Shrine (Q11568963)}} - [deity] Kumano Kusubi no Mikoto. Shikinaisha. * Nigishi Shrine - [deities] Ōyamazumi-no-Mikoto and Ninigi-no-Mikoto. === Nearby === * Former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kizu Port|1=UNKNOWN}} * Shin-Asahi Waterfowl Center * {{ill|lt=Tatesuna Shrine (Takashima)|Q11387238|qid=Q11387238|lt=Tatesuna Shrine|1=Tatehaya Shrine (Takashima)}} * Kizu ancient ironmaking site * NPO Kumanoyama Net * Wakamiya Hachiman-sha * {{ill|lt=Ōkuninushi Shrine (Takashima)|Q11433666|qid=Q11433666|lt=Ōkuninushi Shrine|1=Ookuninushi Shrine (Takashima)}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=Shinto|Q812767|qid=Q812767|1=Shinto}} * {{ill|lt=Shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hanifu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hanifu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hanifu Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Takashima, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]]
